executable.title: Image Coordinate Transforms (MIATT HW06)
executable.description: Practice the four ITK coordinate transform methods on a 3D medical image: TransformIndexToPhysicalPoint, TransformPhysicalPointToIndex, TransformPhysicalPointToContinuousIndex, and TransformContinuousIndexToPhysicalPoint.
executable.parameters:
Physical Point A point in physical (world) space in mm to transform into index space. // TODO: Your code here physX physX Physical X (mm) X component of the input physical point (mm). 0.0
// TODO: Your code here
Integer Index A voxel address in integer index space to transform into physical space. // TODO: Your code here indexI indexI Index I I component of the integer voxel index. 0 // TODO: Your code here
